text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day in the early afternoon, I spot Grass
Wonder deep in contemplation.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I really shouldn't eat too much more, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer. I'm trying to decide the appropriate
amount of food for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's a little embarrassing to admit this, but... I'm
afraid I may have already gone and stuffed
myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It was so lovely out, my classmates and I had
tea together.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I was having such a wonderful time chatting
and drinking, I kept reaching for sweet after
sweet.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You should have seen it. Spe had a treat in each
hand the whole time... Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The question is, what am I to do now? I suppose
you might consider this my just deserts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder looks to me for an answer. It'd be
bad for her health if she ate too much, but sweets
are no substitute for a proper lunch...
choice_data_list: You know, gluttony is considered a sin.
You can't train well on an empty stomach.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... You might be right there. For today, I
should practice restraint.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Still, our tea party was such a treat. Won't
you join us next time, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I promise you I'll be moderate with my sweets
intake. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Making tea with her friends seems to have put
Grass Wonder in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well... I agree, a lackluster meal leads to a
lackluster performance.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Having a balanced diet is part of one's training
regimen. I might be overeating a little, but my
body needs its nutrients. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. With that settled, I'll have to pick
something that compliments the leftover tea...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder makes a conscious effort to eat
well and better her training.
